prestazioni: Replace the stock Ford Sigma 2.0L Duratec (engine code: *GDI-200*) with a fully built *Cosworth-tuned* version featuring forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm bore, 9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet steel crankshaft for 9,500 RPM reliability. Pair with a *Titanium Valvetrain* kit (Ferrea valves, titanium retainers, and upgraded valve springs) to handle aggressive camshafts (*Kent Cams 294° duration, 12.5mm lift*).

Install a *TTV Racing 5.5" twin-plate sintered clutch* with a *Paddy Hopkirk quick-shift gear linkage* to handle the increased torque from a *DTA S80 Pro ECU* with custom mapping for E85 fuel, paired with a *Radium Engineering dual-catch can system* to prevent oil contamination under sustained high-RPM track use.

Upgrade the factory *Caterham De Dion rear axle* with a *Quaife ATB helical LSD* (45% lock) and *Eibach ERS coilovers* (adjustable damping, 2-way rebound/compression) with *polyurethane bushings* (SuperPro) for razor-sharp turn-in. Replace the stock brake system with *AP Racing CP6680-2600 4-pot calipers* (304mm vented rotors) and *Ferodo DS2500 pads* for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: Replace the stock fiberglass nosecone with a *Caterham Motorsport carbon fiber front splitter* (part #CM-012) and a *custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser* (modeled after the 420R Cup aero package) to reduce lift by 18% at 120mph. Paint in *PPG Concept Vibrance* 'Lime Green' with *3M Scotchcal matte black* accents on the roll hoop and side pods.

Swap the OEM seats for *Sparco Pro 2000* (carbon-Kevlar shell, FIA 8855-1999 certified) with *Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses* and a *Caterham Motorsport bolt-in FIA-spec roll cage* (part #CM-005) for rigidity. Add a *Momo Mod.77* steering wheel (320mm, suede) with a *NRG quick-release hub*.

Install a *Caterham Motorsport carbon fiber engine cover* (part #CM-015) with a *custom laser-cut aluminum radiator shroud* (brushed finish) and *AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge* mounted in a *Defi Advance BF* pod on the dashboard. Replace the stock headlights with *Hella Rallye 4000* (H4, 100W) and add *Rally Innovations LED taillights* for improved visibility.
